name: cmdbuild-c2mtest-to-zabbix-host-lifecycle
description: Demo/e2e conversion rules for the abstract C2MTestCI CMDBuild model plus current-dev dynamic class smoke additions. Related C2MTestAddress and C2MTestReferenceLevel* classes are reached only through reference/domain paths.

catalog.source: production-empty starter with dev runtime defaults

templates.name: Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent

templateConflictRules.name: hp-interface-removes-conflicting-agent-templates
templateConflictRules.reason: HP iLO by SNMP already contains item key icmpping and populates inventory field Name; keeping ICMP Ping or agent templates with it makes Zabbix reject host.create/host.update.

templateConflictRules.name: generic-snmp-removes-conflicting-agent-templates
templateConflictRules.reason: Generic by SNMP already contains item key icmpping and populates inventory field Name; keeping ICMP Ping or agent templates with it makes Zabbix reject host.create/host.update.

templateConflictRules.name: windows-agent-removes-conflicting-agent-templates
templateConflictRules.reason: Windows by Zabbix agent conflicts with Linux/Zabbix agent templates on host.update when CMDBuild OS changes or an existing host was created by fallback rules.

templateConflictRules.name: zabbix-agent-removes-conflicting-os-agent-templates
templateConflictRules.reason: Plain Zabbix agent template conflicts with OS-specific agent templates on host.update.
